issue: fs.appendFileSync(LOG_FILE, errorData) may cause data loss if the error is catastrophic and log file is not accessible
fix: Implement a retry mechanism or log the error to a database that provides a durability guarantee

issue: Uncaught error in the /api/sentinel/scan endpoint may cause the server to crash
fix: Catch and handle the error in the /api/sentinel/scan endpoint

issue: /slow-api endpoint may cause high latency for the client
fix: Implement a more efficient delay mechanism or optimize the slow API logic

issue: Server error handling in the '/api/sentinel/scan' endpoint only covers specific error cases, leaving other unexpected errors uncovered
fix: Implement a more robust server error handling mechanism
